definitions.text: få beskjed om å sette i gang med noe
definitions.translation: to be told to start something

examples.no: hun fikk marsjordre da underslaget ble oppdaget
examples.en: she was given her marching orders when the embezzlement was discovered

definitions.translation: to be sent off (in a game)

examples.no: spilleren fikk marsjordre etter den stygge taklingen
examples.en: the player was given his marching orders after the ugly tackle
